◆ BakeIntoCombined() [2/2]

static bool MB3_MeshBakerEditorFunctions.BakeIntoCombined ( MB3_MeshBakerCommon  mom,
out bool  createdDummyTextureBakeResults,
ref SerializedObject  so 
)
static

Bakes a combined mesh.

Parameters
soIf this is being called from Inspector code then pass in the SerializedObject for the component. This is necessary for "bake into prefab" which can corrupt the SerializedObject.
